Cloud Sync Active
World of Eryndor
The Veil between worlds is broken. Violet lightning tears the sky. The dead walk freely and entire kingdoms have warped into unnatural wastelands. You are an Outworlder — a soul dragged through the Veil during the failed Shattered Summoning — cast into the dying world of Eryndor with no memory of how or why.

Two great factions war for the soul of this world. The Luminous Covenant would reopen the Veil and restore the gods. The Ashen Dominion worships the Devouring King — the entity that slipped through during the summoning.

Choose your allegiance. Shape the fate of Eryndor.
☀ The Luminous Covenant 💀 The Ashen Dominion
v3.6 · Rune Haven · Mobile & Desktop
🌀 Chronicles of Eryndor
Select a Chronicle to continue, or create a new Outworlder.

📜 Chronological Updates
LATEST PATCH NOTES
v3.6 - The Chronicles & Discovery Update Mar 9, 2026
  • Quest System: Embark on main story arcs and faction-specific missions via the Quest Log.
  • Random Discoveries: Find lost travelers, overturned carriages, and hidden chests in the wilds.
  • Mimics & Ambushes: Beware! Some discovery chests are alive and hungry.
v3.6 - The Stash & Hoarder Update
  • Player Stash: New 200-slot chest in Solmara for storing gear and gold.
  • Jewelry Slot: Rings, amulets, and gems can now be equipped for powerful scaling bonuses.
v3.6 - Dungeons & Legends
  • World Dungeons: Travel to the Ancient Catacombs, Iron Garrison, and more.
  • Boss Loot: Legendary items are now exclusively guarded by dungeon bosses.
⚔️ Chronicle of Quests

💀
The Veil Claims You
Your soul dissolves into the Veil. The darkness swallows you whole…
but Outworlders are hard to kill. You awaken at Solmara.
💀
PERMANENTLY DEAD
Hardcore · Permadeath
has taken everything from you.
Your chronicle has been permanently erased from Eryndor.
There is no return from the Veil for the fallen.
